message.content:
(1) Left panel: FAIL - Image shows a console error page, not the described emerald gradient panel with logo/title/bullets/copyright.  
(2) Right panel: FAIL - No login form elements (heading, fields, button) visible; only a console error.  
(3) 'Connexion rapide démo' separator: FAIL - Not present; console error page is displayed.  
(4) 5 quick-login buttons: FAIL - No role buttons visible; console error page is displayed.  

Overall: FAIL - The image does not match the described login screen; it shows a development console error instead.
